texto: We know ourselves very little. We are not at the center of ourselves, but instead like the Earth in the Milky Way, and the Milky Way in the universe; far out on a distant edge, hearing a little of what is transpiring.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David Eaglemann: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “We know ourselves very little. We are not at the center of ourselves, but instead like the Earth …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, inner-peace, self pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de self.
